title: Short title
doc_html:
§2622.  Short title

The provisions of this Chapter shall be known and may be referred to as the "Seizure and Controlled Dangerous Substances Property Forfeiture Act of 1989".

Acts 1989, No. 375, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1990.
